entry.title: lissy93 contributed to lissy93/dashy
entry.content:
lissy93 merged lissy93/dashy#2234 · July 8, 2026 14:05
Catch and warn if OIDC provider fails to issue token #2234

Category

Bugfix

Overview

Bail out early with an error message, when a still-valid token gets rejected server-side. Should solve the looping issue, …

entry.title: lissy93 closed an issue in dashy
entry.content:
lissy93 closed an issue in lissy93/dashy · July 8, 2026 14:06
[BUG] OIDC login gets stuck in an infinite redirect loop — stale _bootstrap.authenticated flag wipes a just-issued valid session #2230
**Dashy version:** V-4.4.0 ### Summary When OIDC is enabled (`appConfig.auth.enableOidc: true`), login with a working, spec-compliant OIDC provider…
3 comments
